session.user: Run these two commands and report results: 1. uv run ruff check packages/erk-mcp/tests/test_server.py 2. uv run pytest packages/erk-mcp/tests/test_server.py -v
session.assistant: I'll run both commands and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run pytest tests in test_server.py with verbose output
